positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a group of whimsical forest animals—a fox, a rabbit, an owl, and a deer—interact around a glowing crescent moon and a cluster of delicate glowing fireflies. The style is inspired by vintage children's book art and sophisticated nature engravings, featuring thick, clean outlines, flat color blocking, and sophisticated linework. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed for apparel print. The color palette should be soft pastels (sage green, dusty blue, burnt orange, cream) accented by glowing cyan and gold. The lighting is warm and magical, with deep contrast emphasizing the silhouette of the animals against the luminous background. Vector art quality, perfect for screen printing, high detail, ethereal, kawaii style, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, ugly, noise, dirty, low detail, 3d render, photographic, hyperrealistic
